T0168.title: Fuzzy Lookup
T0168.definition: A query method within social engineering databases that uses scattered clues for fuzzy matching to unearth sensitive information on a specific target.
T0168.description: Attackers leverage known fragments of a target's information to perform associative searches within underground databases, piecing together a complete profile of their identity, social connections, and finances. This type of query is often used for doxing and the intelligence-gathering phase preceding precision fraud, significantly increasing the success rate of downstream crimes.
